sales.description:
Ancients
SICILY. Messana. Ca. 425-413 BC. AR tetradrachm (25mm, 17.23 gm, 8h). NGC Choice VF 5/5 - 3/5, Fine Style, brushed. Nymph Messana driving biga of mules walking right; Nike walking right on reigns to crown mules with wreath, olive leaf and berry in exergue / ΜΕΣ-Σ-Α-Ν-ΙΟ-Ν, hare springing right; dolphin leaping right below. SNG ANS 358-359. SNG Lloyd 1095. Smoothly defined animal portraiture. 

Ex David P. Herman, private sale with old dealer's tag included. 

The coins of Greek Sicily...
